visual_director_arbiter.mission: integrate scene prompt briefs before image generation
critical_checks: cast count and roles do not drift
PPE colors and vehicle shapes remain stable
gaze targets are visible inside the frame
hazard zone, pedestrian route, and vehicle lane remain spatially coherent
no exact Korean or English text is requested inside keyframes
visual_director_arbiter.deferred_work: parallel consistency-evaluation agents can be added later

generation_policy.parallelize: scene prompt drafting and review only
generation_policy.centralize: final imagegen execution through one coordinator
generation_policy.reason: parallel image generation can break identity, PPE, vehicle, camera, and style continuity
